'''pazhopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pochismo|pochismo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pochismo|pochismo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pazhopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæzhepeth|pæzhepeth]] || [[word:pæzhepej|pæzhepej]] || [[word:pæzhepesh|pæzhepesh]] || [[word:pæzhepe|pæzhepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazhozhopoth|pazhozhopoth]] || [[word:pazhozhopoj|pazhozhopoj]] || [[word:pazhozhoposh|pazhozhoposh]] || [[word:pazhozhopo|pazhozhopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazhopoth|pazhopoth]] || [[word:pazhopoj|pazhopoj]] || [[word:pazhoposh|pazhoposh]] || [[word:pazhopo|pazhopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazhofpoth|pazhofpoth]] || [[word:pazhofpoj|pazhofpoj]] || [[word:pazhofposh|pazhofposh]] || [[word:pazhofpof|pazhofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pazhopotho|pazhopotho]] || [[word:pazhopojo|pazhopojo]] || [[word:pazhoposho|pazhoposho]] || [[word:pazhopoko|pazhopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pazhopoth|pazhopoth]] || [[word:pazhopoj|pazhopoj]] || [[word:pazhoposh|pazhoposh]] || [[word:pazhopo|pazhopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pazhopothol|pazhopothol]] || [[word:pazhopojol|pazhopojol]] || [[word:pazhoposhol|pazhoposhol]] || [[word:pazhopokol|pazhopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pazhopothotho|pazhopothotho]] || [[word:pazhopojojo|pazhopojojo]] || [[word:pazhoposhosho|pazhoposhosho]] || [[word:pazhopoko|pazhopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pazhopothon|pazhopothon]] || [[word:pazhopojon|pazhopojon]] || [[word:pazhoposhon|pazhoposhon]] || [[word:pazhopokon|pazhopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pazhopothoro|pazhopothoro]] || [[word:pazhopojoro|pazhopojoro]] || [[word:pazhoposhoro|pazhoposhoro]] || [[word:pazhopokoro|pazhopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
